## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call between Anish (FunnelBoost) and Marcel (GrowthX) to explore potential synergies and discuss their respective companies' products and strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/8jZyEY9gyMtSPSBZkX1sSmTw4AWoymxY?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Both companies are experiencing rapid growth: FunnelBoost recently closed half its funding round, while GrowthX closed Series A and is hiring aggressively (41 employees, 6 new hires starting Monday).](https://fathom.video/share/8jZyEY9gyMtSPSBZkX1sSmTw4AWoymxY?tab=summary&timestamp=8.0)
  - [FunnelBoost's platform searches for real-time buying signals on social platforms, helping businesses find active customers. Current focus on Reddit, expanding to Twitter, LinkedIn, Facebook groups, and Discord.](https://fathom.video/share/8jZyEY9gyMtSPSBZkX1sSmTw4AWoymxY?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [GrowthX focuses on AI-powered content creation for organic traffic growth, using an AI workflow engine and runtime layer. They've scaled to $7M ARR quickly and work with major clients like Reddit, Webflow, and Ramp.](https://fathom.video/share/8jZyEY9gyMtSPSBZkX1sSmTw4AWoymxY?tab=summary&timestamp=525.0)
  - [Potential collaboration opportunity: GrowthX expressed interest in FunnelBoost's upcoming API for social listening and insights extraction to enhance their content generation process.](https://fathom.video/share/8jZyEY9gyMtSPSBZkX1sSmTw4AWoymxY?tab=summary&timestamp=697.0)

## Topics

### Company Updates and Growth

  - [FunnelBoost:](https://fathom.video/share/8jZyEY9gyMtSPSBZkX1sSmTw4AWoymxY?tab=summary&timestamp=47.0)
      - [Recently closed half of their funding round](https://fathom.video/share/8jZyEY9gyMtSPSBZkX1sSmTw4AWoymxY?tab=summary&timestamp=52.0)
      - [Hiring challenges: secured front-end and design hires, still seeking back-end engineers](https://fathom.video/share/8jZyEY9gyMtSPSBZkX1sSmTw4AWoymxY?tab=summary&timestamp=89.0)
      - [Anish closed 10 customers in the first month, driving over $7M in transaction volume](https://fathom.video/share/8jZyEY9gyMtSPSBZkX1sSmTw4AWoymxY?tab=summary&timestamp=426.0)
  - [GrowthX:](https://fathom.video/share/8jZyEY9gyMtSPSBZkX1sSmTw4AWoymxY?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)
      - [Closed Series A funding a couple of weeks ago](https://fathom.video/share/8jZyEY9gyMtSPSBZkX1sSmTw4AWoymxY?tab=summary&timestamp=14.0)
      - [Rapidly hiring: 41 employees currently, 6 new hires starting Monday](https://fathom.video/share/8jZyEY9gyMtSPSBZkX1sSmTw4AWoymxY?tab=summary&timestamp=22.0)
      - [Scaled to $7M ARR quickly, now starting to burn some money for growth](https://fathom.video/share/8jZyEY9gyMtSPSBZkX1sSmTw4AWoymxY?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)

### FunnelBoost Product Overview

  - [Platform searches the internet for real-time buying signals](https://fathom.video/share/8jZyEY9gyMtSPSBZkX1sSmTw4AWoymxY?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Current focus on social platforms: Reddit, expanding to Twitter, LinkedIn, Facebook groups, Discord](https://fathom.video/share/8jZyEY9gyMtSPSBZkX1sSmTw4AWoymxY?tab=summary&timestamp=201.0)
  - [Users can personalize search criteria using natural language](https://fathom.video/share/8jZyEY9gyMtSPSBZkX1sSmTw4AWoymxY?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)
  - [Example use case: payment processing company finding leads and monitoring competition](https://fathom.video/share/8jZyEY9gyMtSPSBZkX1sSmTw4AWoymxY?tab=summary&timestamp=219.0)
  - [Dashboard with customizable smart columns for different signal types](https://fathom.video/share/8jZyEY9gyMtSPSBZkX1sSmTw4AWoymxY?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)
  - [Real-time notifications via Slack integration](https://fathom.video/share/8jZyEY9gyMtSPSBZkX1sSmTw4AWoymxY?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)
  - [Upcoming features:](https://fathom.video/share/8jZyEY9gyMtSPSBZkX1sSmTw4AWoymxY?tab=summary&timestamp=446.0)
      - [Support for more platforms beyond Reddit](https://fathom.video/share/8jZyEY9gyMtSPSBZkX1sSmTw4AWoymxY?tab=summary&timestamp=446.0)
      - [API exposure (in about a month)](https://fathom.video/share/8jZyEY9gyMtSPSBZkX1sSmTw4AWoymxY?tab=summary&timestamp=737.0)
      - [Integration with PicoOS for agentic workflows](https://fathom.video/share/8jZyEY9gyMtSPSBZkX1sSmTw4AWoymxY?tab=summary&timestamp=737.0)
      - [Potential for end-to-end autonomous SDR or marketer agents](https://fathom.video/share/8jZyEY9gyMtSPSBZkX1sSmTw4AWoymxY?tab=summary&timestamp=737.0)

### GrowthX Product and Services

  - [Focus on AI-powered content creation for organic traffic growth](https://fathom.video/share/8jZyEY9gyMtSPSBZkX1sSmTw4AWoymxY?tab=summary&timestamp=525.0)
  - [Services include editorial content, content refresh, and programmatic SEO](https://fathom.video/share/8jZyEY9gyMtSPSBZkX1sSmTw4AWoymxY?tab=summary&timestamp=1237.0)
  - [Built an AI workflow engine and runtime layer for complex content generation](https://fathom.video/share/8jZyEY9gyMtSPSBZkX1sSmTw4AWoymxY?tab=summary&timestamp=1530.0)
  - [Use cases:](https://fathom.video/share/8jZyEY9gyMtSPSBZkX1sSmTw4AWoymxY?tab=summary&timestamp=1237.0)
      - [Running blogs for major clients (Reddit, Ramp, Attention.com)](https://fathom.video/share/8jZyEY9gyMtSPSBZkX1sSmTw4AWoymxY?tab=summary&timestamp=1237.0)
      - [Creating programmatic content (e.g., expense category pages for Ramp)](https://fathom.video/share/8jZyEY9gyMtSPSBZkX1sSmTw4AWoymxY?tab=summary&timestamp=1247.0)
  - [Process involves:](https://fathom.video/share/8jZyEY9gyMtSPSBZkX1sSmTw4AWoymxY?tab=summary&timestamp=1237.0)
      - [Initial research on client and personas (2 weeks)](https://fathom.video/share/8jZyEY9gyMtSPSBZkX1sSmTw4AWoymxY?tab=summary&timestamp=1237.0)
      - [Developing a comprehensive content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/8jZyEY9gyMtSPSBZkX1sSmTw4AWoymxY?tab=summary&timestamp=1237.0)
      - [Calibration process to align with client's tone and quality expectations](https://fathom.video/share/8jZyEY9gyMtSPSBZkX1sSmTw4AWoymxY?tab=summary&timestamp=1237.0)
  - [Demonstrated a company context generator workflow for FunnelBoost](https://fathom.video/share/8jZyEY9gyMtSPSBZkX1sSmTw4AWoymxY?tab=summary&timestamp=1413.0)

### Potential Collaboration Opportunities

  - [GrowthX interested in FunnelBoost's upcoming API for:](https://fathom.video/share/8jZyEY9gyMtSPSBZkX1sSmTw4AWoymxY?tab=summary&timestamp=697.0)
      - [Social listening capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/8jZyEY9gyMtSPSBZkX1sSmTw4AWoymxY?tab=summary&timestamp=724.0)
      - [Bulk insights extraction](https://fathom.video/share/8jZyEY9gyMtSPSBZkX1sSmTw4AWoymxY?tab=summary&timestamp=697.0)
      - [Integration into GrowthX's content generation workflows](https://fathom.video/share/8jZyEY9gyMtSPSBZkX1sSmTw4AWoymxY?tab=summary&timestamp=697.0)
  - [Possible use case: Finding mentions of AI app building on social platforms to create template content pages](https://fathom.video/share/8jZyEY9gyMtSPSBZkX1sSmTw4AWoymxY?tab=summary&timestamp=871.0)

### Content Strategy Discussion

  - [Anish seeking advice on personal branding content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/8jZyEY9gyMtSPSBZkX1sSmTw4AWoymxY?tab=summary&timestamp=1100.0)
  - [Marcel shared insights on working with early-stage startups vs. established companies](https://fathom.video/share/8jZyEY9gyMtSPSBZkX1sSmTw4AWoymxY?tab=summary&timestamp=1116.0)
  - [Discussion on the importance of consistent content creation and overcoming perfectionism](https://fathom.video/share/8jZyEY9gyMtSPSBZkX1sSmTw4AWoymxY?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Anish to keep Marcel updated on FunnelBoost's API release (estimated 4-5 weeks)](https://fathom.video/share/8jZyEY9gyMtSPSBZkX1sSmTw4AWoymxY?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Explore potential integration of FunnelBoost's API into GrowthX's workflows once available](https://fathom.video/share/8jZyEY9gyMtSPSBZkX1sSmTw4AWoymxY?tab=summary&timestamp=1027.0)
  - [Consider further discussions on content strategy collaboration, particularly for Anish's personal branding efforts on LinkedIn and Twitter](https://fathom.video/share/8jZyEY9gyMtSPSBZkX1sSmTw4AWoymxY?tab=summary&timestamp=1100.0)
